title: eriogonum microtheca subsp. confertiflorum
intro: Eriogonum microtheca subsp. confertiflorum, also known as a subspecies of buckwheat flax or desert trumpet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to thePolygonaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum microtheca subsp. confertiflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
